title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 12 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 12 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 12 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 12/09/2025
Today, the most-traded iron ore futures contract held up well during the day, with the most-traded contract I2601 closing at 799.5, down 0.06%from the previous trading day. Traders sold at market prices; some steel mills locked in profits, and procurement volume increased. Most steel mills remained cau ous and adopted a wait and-see approach, with purchase willingness remaining moderate.
